evidence.text: Title: The largest AI agent deployment in banking | Gradient Labs URL Source: https://gradient-labs.ai/customers/digital-bank-at-scale Markdown Content: ### Turning years of knowledge into day-one capability The sheer variety of inbound support requests, which spanned thousands of query types across dozens of products and subscription tiers, meant that getting the AI agent to the right answer required a knowledge base as broad and precise as the product range itself. To automate any customer support cases, the bank first needed to share its internal knowledge with Gradient Labs. Gradient Labs ingested the bank's extensive knowledge base,
